Amaranth Bio

July 22, 2023

  • 2023
  • oc-amaranth
  • wof

About:
Name: Amaranth
Tribe: Skywing
Location: Possibility
Pronouns: he/him
Gender/Orientation: Transmasc, Bisexual
Age: 12 (28 human)

Biography:
 Amaranth was raised by his mother in a small village on the edge of the Skywing kingdom. His father died in the Succession War, and he hardly remembers him. When Amaranth grew up, he moved to a small hut in the outskirts of Possibility. He makes a living doing odd jobs around town, living day-to-day. He enjoys (or what little he can enjoy) reading fiction (~escapism~) and occasionally drawing. He has carried depression with him from leaving his hometown, and it’s expressed with a lot of anger. He is lonely, and upset with himself more than anything.
Check out art other people have done of him on artfight!

LAST MODIFIED: MAY 18, 2026
